name: Sunshine Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg, sugar, orange juice, and melted margarine in a large bowl.
2. Mix well.
3. Stir in biscuit mix, chopped pecans, and orange marmalade until combined.
4. Fill greased muffin tins two-thirds full with the batter.
5. Bake in a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
